column1: Luis Arraez stands out as the top pick, leading off for Colorado with a strong track record of consistency and a favorable lefty matchup against Tanner Gordon. Arraez has hit safely in nearly 80% of games and gets a park boost, making him the most reliable option today. Heliot Ramos also profiles well in the heart of the order, offering steady contact and a solid hit probability. Rafael Devers and Jung Hoo Lee are viable alternatives, both benefiting from platoon advantages and a hitter-friendly environment.
